Uses of Class
recoder.bytecode.ClassFile

Packages that use ClassFile
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext
 
recoder.bytecode
This package contains classes that cover information derived from Java byte code.
recoder.io
The io package provides classes to import and export source and class files.
recoder.service
This package contains the semantical services of RECODER.
